description: Final integration: update planning docs, add dev log entry, run full verification.
steps: 1. Update planning/00_PRIORITY.md: Find task P3-23 and mark it as done (change status indicator).
2. Update planning/03_CURRENT_STATE.md: Add entry about Coach Workflow v1 being implemented (coach_tasks table, training_plans table, CoachView tab, PlayerCardDialog coach tab).
3. Create logs/priority/P3-23-coach-workflow-v1.md: Brief dev log entry describing what was implemented, key decisions made (table design, JSON for exercises, integration points).
4. Run final verification: python -m mypy app/ tests/ --ignore-missing-imports && python -m pytest -x -q. Confirm all tests pass and mypy is clean.
